status_detail: Green hydrogen production and distribution hub at La Rochelle, France. 5 MW PEM electrolysis for industrial, maritime, and mobility offtake. Part of the La Rochelle Zero Carbon Territory initiative. Operational since 2023. Supporting port decarbonization with hydrogen for cranes, trucks, and shipping.

data_management.narrative_summary: The La Rochelle Green H2 Park is a 5 MW PEM electrolysis facility in the port city of La Rochelle, France, operational since 2023. The project produces green hydrogen for port equipment, industrial trucks, and potentially for shipping fuel as part of the broader La Rochelle Zero Carbon Territory program. The project demonstrates the integration of green hydrogen into port operations and logistics.

power.grid_connection_detail: Grid-connected at La Rochelle port area

offtake.offtaker_name: La Rochelle port authority, local logistics and industrial users

stakeholders.developer: La Rochelle Zero Carbon Territory / Urban Community

sources.title: La Rochelle Green H2 Park — port decarbonization with PEM electrolysis
sources.author: La Rochelle Urban Community / ADEME
